text.title: Spatial Design Tool Landscape
text.summary: Tool matrix organized by project phase, device target, and file-format standard for AR/VR/MR workflows.

rule.statement: Pick tools per phase, not per project: concept in Figma + ShapesXR, prototype in Unity or Unreal, production in engine.
rule.rationale: Forcing one tool across all phases introduces fidelity gaps (ShapesXR concepts look different in Unity) and breaks asset pipelines at transition points.

section.title: Tool Matrix
section.p: Concept phase: Figma (2D wireframes with spatial annotations) + ShapesXR or Gravity Sketch (VR-native sketching). Prototype phase: ShapesXR low-fidelity → Unity or Unreal high-fidelity, tested in target headset. Production: Unity or Unreal with XR Interaction Toolkit.
Device-specific additions: visionOS → Reality Composer Pro (scene authoring); Meta Quest → Meta Quest Developer Hub (sideload + metrics); WebXR → Three.js or Babylon.js.

rule.statement: Standardize on USD/USDZ for visionOS handoff; glTF 2.0 for Web/Quest. Pick one format per device and enforce it across the asset pipeline.
rule.rationale: The file-format zoo (USDZ, glTF, FBX, USD, Unity prefabs) is the primary cause of pipeline breaks. A single missing conversion flag (axis swap, scale unit) burns hours per asset.

section.title: Agent-Friendly Tool Assessment
section.p: Figma: partial agent access via REST + plugin API (concept stage, export limited). ShapesXR: limited — VR-native, manual export to Unity. Gravity Sketch: partial — export FBX/OBJ/USD. Unity: full CLI + Cloud Build (batch builds, CI). Unreal: partial (Horde, BuildGraph). Reality Composer Pro: no agent API — macOS only, manual workflow. Spark AR / Lens Studio: no API — vendor-locked.
For 3D capture: Polycam and Luma AI expose REST APIs and output glTF/USDZ — useful for asset library generation.

section.title: Asset Validation CLI
section.p: Use these tools in CI to validate spatial assets before handoff:

list.item: usdcat / usdview — inspect and validate USD/USDZ (Pixar OpenUSD)
gltf-pipeline — glTF compression via Draco / Meshopt (CesiumGS)
